allow: Bash(node --check src/state.js src/tempo.js src/effects.js src/room.js src/enemies.js src/player.js src/ui.js src/main.js)

Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import\('./src/DeckManager.js'\).then\(m => { const keys = Object.keys\(m.CardDefinitions\); console.log\('Cards:', keys.length\); const missing = keys.filter\(k => !m.CardDefinitions[k].rarity\); console.log\('Missing rarity:', missing\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import\('./src/tempo.js'\).then\(m => { const t = new m.TempoSystem\(\); console.log\('DECAY_RATE:', t.DECAY_RATE\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module --eval "import\('./src/Particles.js'\).then\(m => { const p = new m.ParticleSystem\(\); console.log\('Has spawnRoomEntryFlash:', typeof p.spawnRoomEntryFlash, '| Has spawnCrashFlash:', typeof p.spawnCrashFlash\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\)")
